title: kb.trace v1
description: Emitted by kb (src/commands/trace.rs:616) when `kb trace` resolves a provenance trail for an entry. Source: /kb.

evidence_count.description: Total evidence items in the trail.

origin_scheme.description: URI scheme of the trail's origin reference (e.g. 'bd', 'deer-flow'), or '' if the trail has no origin.

resolved_count.description: Number of evidence items in the trail that resolved successfully.
